task_goal_rewrite: Wi-Fi is disabled on the Android device.

checkpoints.description: Wi-Fi toggle is set to the 'Off' position in the device's Settings or Quick Settings panel.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing the Wi-Fi toggle in the off state; Settings page displaying Wi-Fi as disabled.

checkpoints.description: The device does not show an active Wi-Fi connection indicator in the status bar.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot of the device's status bar without an active Wi-Fi icon, or with a greyed-out Wi-Fi icon indicating disconnection.

success_rule: Both required checkpoints must be satisfied to confirm that Wi-Fi has been successfully turned off.
